notes: Bridges the project's ord_P/pointValuation framework with mathlib's HeightOneSpectrum.valuation framework via IsFractionRing.div_surjective + pointValuation_algebraMap_eq_exp_count, discharging NoFinitePolesBridge W fully unconditionally. Three declarations (pointMinusOPrincipalEqZero_unconditional, AddHomProperty_of_miller_divZeroReduce, picZeroIsoE_baseChange_of_AFInputs) are exported to other files but have no in-file callers, and picZeroIsoE_of_AFInputs is the T-III-3-004 (Pic0(E) ≅ E) construction consumed by Miller.lean and OpenLemmaPrimitives.lean.
